arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer targets player he coached at Man United as his first signing since returning to football with Besiktas
arts.sum: A move to Besiktas would see the midfielder reunite with Ole Gunnar Solskjaer, who was appointed the side's new manager this week.

arts.ttl: Solskjaer confirmed as new Besiktas boss
arts.sum: Former Manchester United manager Ole Gunnar Solskjaer signs an 18-month deal as head coach of Besiktas.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano reveals 'initial interest' in Rangers midfielder
arts.sum: Rangers midfielder Tom Lawrence has transfer interest from Turkish side Besiktas.

arts.ttl: Solskjaer in talks to become Besiktas head coach
arts.sum: Besiktas are in talks with former Manchester United manager Ole Gunnar Solskjaer over their head coach vacancy.

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjær to finalise appointment as new Besiktas manager
arts.sum: Norwegian set for his first job since leaving Old Trafford Solskjær greeted by board and fans at Ataturk airport The former Manchester United manager Ole Gunnar Solskjær has held talks in Istanbul over taking charge at Turkish club Besiktas. Solskjær has not held a coaching role since leaving Old Trafford in 2021, but is now negotiating with the Super Lig outfit, who have been without a head coach since letting Giovanni van Bronckhorst go last month. The Norwegian arrived in Turkey on Friday to put the finishing touches to an 18-month deal. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer appointed as new Besiktas head coach
arts.sum: Former Manchester United boss Ole Gunnar Solskjaer has officially been appointed as the new Besiktas head coach. OFFICIAL: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer appointed as new Besiktas head coach

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjær holds up scarf and shares first words in first job after Manchester United
arts.sum: Ole Gunnar Solskjær has been photographed holding up a Besiktas shirt, before sharing his first words ahead of becoming their new manager and his first job post Manchester United. Football Arena share the picture today as Solskjær prepares for his first job after leaving Manchester United in 2021. arts.ttl: Former Manchester United manager Ole Gunnar Solskjaer in talks to become new Besiktas head coach
arts.sum: The former Red Devils boss is being lined up for a return to management after over three years away

arts.ttl: Gio van Bronckhorst replaced by Man United idol at Besiktas as Jose Mourinho grudge match is ON
